commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a cache-only Chrome MCP health probe, routes existing-session browser status/profile/tab/start readiness through it, updates focused tests, and corrects the changelog credit.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main routes passive Chrome MCP status/profile/tab checks through `isTransportAvailable` or `isReachable`, which can reach `getSession` and MCP stdio process startup after the in-memory cache is empty. I did not live-reproduce the macOS consent prompt in this read-only sweep.
